name: Catskill Mountain Rye
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the Donna Celeiro DGSK75A in your bread machine.
2. Add 1 cup of water, 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil, 2 tablespoons of honey, 1 teaspoon of salt, and 1 tablespoon of caraway seeds to the machine.
3. Combine 1 cup of rye flour, 1 3/4 cups of bread flour, 3 tablespoons of dry milk (nonfat), 1 tablespoon of active dry yeast, and 4 tablespoons of gluten in a bowl and mix well.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the bread machine first, followed by the dry ingredients.
5. Set the bread machine to "standard" or "white bread" mode.
6. Run the recipe through the bread machine.
7. The resulting bread will have a high, lighter texture and should fit comfortably in your bread pan without overflowing.
8. This recipe makes great sandwiches that are delicious when toasted.
